title: 180 Self-Adhesive Craft Foam Stickers - Kids Stickers, Assorted Shapes and Colours, Sticky Craft Supplies for Scrapbooking, Card Making, and DIY Projects
features: Foam Stickers for Crafting – 180 bright, self-adhesive foam shapes kids love for cards, scrapbooking and school projects; easy peel-and-stick design keeps creative time fun, quick and mess-free.
Assorted Foam Shapes for Crafts – stars, hearts, flowers and simple shapes in bold colours offer instant inspiration for children’s art, reward charts, displays and DIY projects at home or school.
Kids Craft Stickers with Easy Peel Backing – soft foam texture makes them simple for small hands to handle; ideal for EYFS activities, classroom displays, party bags and hands-on creative learning.

Craft Stickers for Kids that Stick Securely – suitable for paper, card, notebooks and scrapbooks; non-toxic, child-safe foam shapes stay put without mess and are perfect for long-lasting art projects.
180 Self-Adhesive Foam Shapes in a Handy Resealable Pack – generous mix of colours and designs for repeated craft sessions, school groups and holiday projects; ready to use straight from the bag.
description: Product Description Stickers for Children Easy Peel & Stick Foam Shapes 180 Mixed Colour Foam Stickers – Bright self-adhesive shapes for kids’ crafts, scrapbooking, card making & decorations at home, school or parties. Stickers Assorted Foam Shapes for Arts & DIY A 180-piece set of mixed colour stickers for endless craft projects. Great for decorations, party crafts, and group activities — safe, fun and easy for children ages 3+. 180 Foam Stickers for Children Bright, self-adhesive foam shapes including hearts, stars and flowers. Perfect for kids’ crafts, decorations and school projects — easy peel-and-stick design for mess-free fun. Craft Stickers for Kids’ Creativity Encourage imagination with colourful foam stickers that stick to card, paper and more. Ideal for scrapbooking, card making, classroom activities and creative play at home.
